summary: Repaired parent-28 NCCL evidence binding for the active run-local task-1 artifact while preserving the existing bounded NCCL issue facts. #2246 remains a CuTeDSL NCCL device-API question/report involving a host-created ncclDevComm pointer passed into an H20 kernel and failing at first device-side dev_comm.lsa_rank dereference with cudaErrorIllegalAddress. #1957 remains a GIN GDAKI mode report where gin_alltoall_pure with a 1500 MTU NIC hung and the reporter observed hard-coded 4K MTU behavior in doca modify qp / doca modify QP context. The repair updates only evidence-path bindings and verification metadata; it does not claim root cause, fix status, release-note guarantee, benchmark baseline, production postmortem, service SLO, or general compatibility rule.
